THE WALMART AND SURROUNDING AREAS EXPERIENCED HAIL THAT WAS AT LEAST 3 INCHES DIAMETER. THE COMMUNICATIONS CENTER SUPERVISOR MEASURED THE HAIL NEAR 745 PM AND THE STONE WAS 3 INCHES DIAMETER AT THAT TIME...SO IT HAD TIME FOR SOME MELTING. THE SKYLIGHTS OF THE WALMART WERE BROKEN AS WELL AS CAR WINDSHIELDS. HAIL OF THIS SIZE IS SPECIFIED AS TEA CUP SIZED. SIGNIFICANT HAIL DAMAGE THROUGH MUCH OF BUFFALO AND THE CITY OF UNION.
